mission.title: langflow: Component for interacting with LangSmith Prompt Hub
mission.description: Component for interacting with LangSmith Prompt Hub. Requested by 6+ users.

steps.title: Check current langflow setup
steps.description:
Verify your langflow version and configuration:
```bash
pip show langflow | grep Version
```
This feature requires a working langflow installation.

steps.title: Review the feature request
steps.description: Users requested a component that interacts with the LangSmith Prompt Hub, similar to a regular prompt component but using the `ChatPromptTemplate` class to pull prompt templates from LangSmith. The component accepts a LangChain API key and a prompt template name.

steps.title: Apply the LangSmith Prompt Hub component
steps.description:
The fix adds a new component that looks up prompt templates from the LangSmith Hub:
```python
StrInput(
    name="langsmith_prompt",
    display_name="LangSmith Prompt",
    info="The LangSmith prompt to use.",
    value="efriis/my-first-prompt",
),
```
The component pulls the prompt template using:
```python
# Pull a public prompt from LangChain Hub
public_prompt = hub.pull(self.langsmith_prompt)
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the LangSmith Prompt Hub component appears in Langflow and can successfully pull prompt templates.

resolution.summary: Added a LangSmith Prompt Hub component that allows users to input a LangChain API key and pull prompt templates from the LangSmith Hub for use in Langflow flows.
codeSnippets:
StrInput(
    name="langsmith_prompt",
    display_name="LangSmith Prompt",
    info="The LangSmith prompt to use.",
    value="efriis/my-first-prompt",
),

# Pull a public prompt from LangChain Hub
public_prompt = hub.pull(self.langsmith_prompt)

prerequisites.description: Python 3.10+ with langflow installed (pip install langflow). Optionally Docker for containerized deployment.
